# Code Review Instructions

This repository contains my personal study notes for various topics.

A pull request will be made every Sunday, where everything that I've learned
over the week will be added to the notes.

When performing a code review, check for factual accuracy and completeness of
the content. For the added content, generate critical questions that test deep
understanding of the material. The questions should go beyond surface-level
facts and encourage reflection and application of the concepts discussed.
